subject: [PATCH v4 2/4] sunrpc: use per-net counts in svc_seq_show()

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch updates the svc_seq_show() function to read procedure call counts from per-network-namespace arrays instead of global counters. This change allows /proc/net/rpc/nfsd to report procedure call counts for each network namespace separately. The patch only affects the nfsd service, which always allocates these counters via a specific initialization function.
